creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Comment on attachment 175335
update thunderbird and friends

Remove PORTREVISION from -i18n port, the rest is good (and low risk). Maybe ask your mentor if you can apply the following rule

  Any committer may make changes to any other tree with an "Approved by"
  from a non-mentored committer with the appropriate bit.

https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/articles/committers-guide/committer.types.html
